name: hud_ui_panel_constructor_default
description: HudUiPanel::ConstructorDefault initializes a panel from the text-label constructor, installs the panel ftable, assigns default colors/font/text metrics/wrap/shadow fields, and returns self.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiTextLabel::ConstructorWithPosAndFlags, which is functionally accepted but remains binary-safe debt.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ConstructorDefault@HudUiPanel@@QAEPAU1@PBDHH@Z at 0x4ba740 still fails: 218 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, 9 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 240 bytes and the VC object symbol is 208 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows the text-label constructor call, panel ftable install, textPick null, default white colors, dirty flag, OEM_FIXED_FONT stock object, wrap/metric/shadow field initialization, and return self.

The native panel constructor smoke validates ftable identity, text, position, null textPick, default colors, stock font handle, cached text state, metric defaults, wrap rect pointer, and shadow/wrap fields.
